skill1.kitLine: Activates when performing a Full Charge attack.
Effects vary according to the number of attacks. Only one effect is triggered at a time.
skill1.note: Modeled as scalar cumulative phase counter (3rd/6th/9th charge outside, every charge in-burst). The per-phase vs cumulative semantics are the live documented confound — see documentedConfounds.

skill1.kitLine: Three times: Affects the 1 enemy unit(s) with the lowest final DEF.
skill1.note: Per-phase targeting (lowest-DEF single) NOT individually encoded; collapses to target enemy under partless single-boss scope.

skill1.kitLine: Deals 283.03% of final ATK as damage.
Six times: Affects enemies within range.
skill1.note: Per-phase 'within range' targeting NOT individually encoded; collapses to target enemy under partless single-boss scope.

skill1.kitLine: Deals 565% of final ATK as Distributed Damage.

skill1.note: Per-phase 'all enemies' targeting NOT individually encoded; collapses to target enemy under partless single-boss scope.

skill1.kitLine: Deals 848.03% of final ATK as Distributed Damage.
skill1.note: Post-patch value pinned (from 750.47). In-burst count of this large phase is the over-fire hotspot — see confounds.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self.
skill2.note: Auto-filled from offline parser 2026-07-16, behavior-identical to prior runtime parse, NOT hand-verified (per note).

burst.kitLine: Changes Full Charge attack count required for Skill 1 to 1 time/2 times/3 times for 10 sec.
burst.where: skill1[0].trigger.countInFb:1 + engine gating on HER OWN burst cast (sim.ts:1745)
burst.note: NOT a burst-block effect; encoded via skill1 trigger countInFb + sim.ts gating for 10s on her own burst cast. Caveat #3 confirms this IS modeled; the older 'unparsed' caveat is stale. Modeled as scalar countInFb=1 (per-phase 1/2/3 reading tested cold and reverted).

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: phase-threshold semantics are a scalar 3 (outside) / 1 (in-burst) model = the CUMULATIVE '3rd/6th/9th charge' reading; the per-phase reading ([3,6,9]/[1,2,3]) tested ~22% cold and own-probe evidence is split (sbs-control: procs ~every charge in burst; N3 re-read: 848% absent in one window) — isolated-burst recording queued.
documentedConfounds.why: This is THE live proc-count knot: the every-charge in-burst model over-fires the large 848% phase (~5x/burst), driving the HOT band (N3 ~1.13-1.18 OVER). Reverted to scalar 3/1 pending isolated-burst SBS recording.

documentedConfounds.text: Charge cycle modeled 40f (datamined 18f charge + standard 22f SR/RL recovery) vs video-measured ~42f/0.70s.
documentedConfounds.why: ks-extract finding F2: ~2f short per cycle => sim ~4.8% fast, ~= the +4.9% HOT contribution. Re-pinnable from N3/sbs-control footage.

documentedConfounds.text: After charge fix + FB-by-timing on clustered burst-window procs she grades ~1.13->~1.18 in N3 (OVER, flipped from old ~0.73 under); baseline rose 505.6M->528.3M once soda's Golden Chip +10.51% ATK pulse on scarlet was modeled.
documentedConfounds.why: Confirms the over-model direction and magnitude; the extra hotness is her own proc-count over-fire now more fully exposed after the real soda buff was added.

documentedConfounds.text: Secondary candidate: non-core normal value (DBG max 1.30M vs a real 1.55M popup, buff-state dependent).
documentedConfounds.why: Open, not yet pinned; secondary to the proc-count knot, direction/magnitude unconfirmed.

documentedConfounds.text: ATK/rotation confound: sim charge-normal 1.64M vs real 1.03M; sim rotation faster than real.
documentedConfounds.why: Measurement-side confound entangled with the proc-count pin; 'sim rotation faster than real' would over-fire => HOT-leaning, but it obscures rather than confirms the exact gap.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: the count-requirement line IS modeled — chargeCounter.countInFb gated on HER OWN burst cast for 10s (sim.ts:1745); the previous 'unparsed' caveat and unmodeled.burst entry were stale.
documentedConfounds.why: Clarification that the line is modeled; resolves the stale 'unparsed' caveat — a KNOWN-non-gap, not a surprise.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: unparsed effect "Changes Full Charge attack count required for Skill 1 to 1 time/2 times/3 times for 10 sec."
documentedConfounds.why: STALE — superseded by the caveat above confirming the line is modeled via countInFb + sim.ts gating.

documentedConfounds.text: ks-extract F5 (P0-adjacent): coreband-scarlet-ar.json tagged scarlet-black-shadow but records a 20-round AR — likely base scarlet footage misattributed; owner identity re-verify.
documentedConfounds.why: Evidence-provenance risk affecting calibration confidence, not a sim modeling gap; does not itself shift sim output but could mislead the pin.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled S1 faithfully as a real per-full-charge phase counter (chargeCounter trigger, count 3 outside / countInFb 1 in-burst) firing 283.03% single / 565% distributed / 848.03% distributed, with her burst lowering the thresholds for 10s gated on HER OWN burst cast (not the team FB window) so procs cluster into her burst window and the +50% Full Burst applies per-proc by landing timing — retiring the old hitCount:10 + noFb fudge. Key approximations: a scalar 3/1 cumulative phase model (the per-phase [3,6,9]/[1,2,3] reading tested ~22% cold and was reverted pending an isolated-burst recording), and charge latency settled at datamined 18f + 22f recovery = 40f cycle vs measured ~42f. Known-not-yet-faithful: the in-burst large-phase (848%) proc count is over-modeled (every-charge over-fires), the primary driver of the HOT band (N3 ~1.13-1.18 OVER); a secondary non-core normal-value discrepancy and an ATK/rotation measurement confound remain open, and a misattributed coreband evidence file needs identity re-verify.
